steps.title: Rewrite the second ratio
steps.content:
Factor the second ratio so it uses $\frac{x}{y}$:
$$
\frac{cx}{6y}=\frac{c}{6}\cdot \frac{x}{y}
$$
Since $\frac{x}{y}=72$,
$$
\frac{c}{6}\cdot 72=72
$$

steps.title: Solve for c
steps.content: Divide both sides by $72$, then multiply by $6$: $$ \frac{c}{6}=1 $$ $$ c=6 $$ The answer is A.
